# IssuerBoundCredentialStore.CredentialsFor method

Returns the credentials stored for *issuer*, or `null`. Never another issuer's (R-23.16-b, R-23.16-c).

```csharp
public IssuerBoundCredentials? CredentialsFor(string issuer)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| issuer | The authorization-server issuer. |

## Return Value

The stored credentials, or `null`.
